basic_details.job_title: Assam University Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 123 Professor, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Assam University invites online applications for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions across multiple departments. This is a regular teaching recruitment with postings at Silchar HQ and Diphu Campus.

application_fee.sc_fee: Exempted from fee (Rs. 500/- as postal expenses only)
application_fee.details: Fee to be paid online through payment gateway.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill UGC / University norms as on the closing date. | Professor: Ph.D. degree with minimum 10 years teaching/research experience and significant publications. Associate Professor: Ph.D. with minimum 8 years experience and good publication record. Assistant Professor: Master’s degree with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations. | Areas of Specializations are specified department-wise (e.g., Physical Anthropology for Anthropology, Microbial Ecology for Ecology & Environmental Science, etc.). Detailed specializations are available in the notification. | Reservation applies as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD.

selection_process: Screening of applications by duly constituted committees. Interview for shortlisted candidates. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee call for interview. University may conduct written test if applications are large in number.
how_to_apply: Fill the online application form carefully (Part-A & Part-B).
Upload photograph, signature, and all relevant documents.
Download the PDF of the submitted application.

Submit Hard Copy (mandatory) along with self-attested documents to: Deputy Registrar, Room No. 103, Raja Rammohan Roy Administrative Building, Assam University, Silchar – 788011, Cachar, Assam by Speed Post / Registered Post.
Proof of age, educational qualifications, experience certificates, caste/disability certificates, publications, etc.
important_instructions: Hard copy submission is mandatory. Separate application for each post. Canvassing in any form leads to disqualification. University reserves the right to withdraw/cancel posts. No correspondence regarding rejection will be entertained. Jurisdiction for disputes: High Court, Guwahati.

content_sections.heading: Assam University Silchar Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Assam University, a Central University, has released Employment Notification No. 2/2026 dated 26th May 2026 for various teaching positions at its Silchar Headquarters and Diphu Campus. The detailed notification includes complete information on vacancies (including backlog and leave vacancies), post codes, areas of specialization, essential/desirable qualifications, reservation details, pay matrix, application procedure, and general instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification carefully before applying. Download Assam University Silchar Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Assam University Silchar Teaching Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Assam University invites online applications for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions across multiple departments. This is a regular teaching recruitment with postings at Silchar HQ and Diphu Campus.

rows.event: Last Date for Online Application & Fee
Last Date for Hard Copy Submission
rows.date: To be notified / as per last date

content_sections.heading: Assam University Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: Professor Positions (Multiple departments including Agricultural Engineering, Chemistry, Computer Science, Commerce, Economics, Education, Law, etc.) Associate Professor Positions (Agricultural Engineering, Arabic, Bengali, Computer Science & Engineering, Ecology, Education, Electronics, English, etc.) Assistant Professor Positions (Agricultural Engineering, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Commerce, Computer Science, Education, Ecology, Hindi, Law, Manipuri, Mass Communication, etc.) Professor, Associate Professor & Assistant Professor in Geography, History, Life Science & Bioinformatics, Physics, Commerce, Political Science, Anthropology, etc. Backlog Reserved Vacancies and Leave Vacancies are also notified separately for SC, ST, OBC, EWS, and PwBD categories. Leave Vacancies

content_sections.heading: Assam University Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Pay Scale
Assam University Silchar Eligibility Criteria & Qualifications
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill UGC / University norms as on the closing date. Professor : Ph.D. degree with minimum 10 years teaching/research experience and significant publications. Associate Professor : Ph.D. with minimum 8 years experience and good publication record. Assistant Professor : Master’s degree with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations. Areas of Specializations are specified department-wise (e.g., Physical Anthropology for Anthropology, Microbial Ecology for Ecology & Environmental Science, etc.). Detailed specializations are available in the notification. Reservation applies as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD.

content_sections.heading: Assam University Silchar Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee to be paid online through payment gateway.

rows.fee: Exempted from fee (Rs. 500/- as postal expenses only)

content_sections.heading: Assam University Silchar Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications by duly constituted committees. Interview for shortlisted candidates. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee call for interview. University may conduct written test if applications are large in number.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Assam University Teaching Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit https://curec.samarth.ac.in/ and register. Fill the online application form carefully (Part-A & Part-B). Upload photograph, signature, and all relevant documents. Pay the application fee (if applicable). Download the PDF of the submitted application. Submit Hard Copy (mandatory) along with self-attested documents to: Deputy Registrar, Room No. 103, Raja Rammohan Roy Administrative Building, Assam University, Silchar – 788011, Cachar, Assam by Speed Post / Registered Post. Documents Required: Proof of age, educational qualifications, experience certificates, caste/disability certificates, publications, etc.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Hard copy submission is mandatory . Separate application for each post. Canvassing in any form leads to disqualification. University reserves the right to withdraw/cancel posts. No correspondence regarding rejection will be entertained. Jurisdiction for disputes: High Court, Guwahati.

content_sections.heading: Who Should Apply?
content_sections.text: Candidates with strong academic records, Ph.D., and publications in reputed journals. Those meeting UGC norms and specific departmental specializations. Candidates willing to work in North-East India.

content_sections.heading: Who Should NOT Apply?
content_sections.text: Candidates not meeting minimum UGC qualifications/experience. Those unable to submit hard copy by the deadline. Applicants without proper category certificates.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Not submitting hard copy. Applying without specific post code/specialization match. Uploading unclear documents. Missing mandatory fields in online form.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Assam University Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 10 July 2026 (11:59 PM). Candidates must also ensure the hard copy reaches the university address within the stipulated time. It is advisable to complete the process early to avoid last-minute technical issues on the Samarth portal.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Assam University Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are over 100 vacancies across Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts at Silchar HQ and Diphu Campus, including regular, backlog reserved, and leave vacancies. Detailed department-wise breakup is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: General, OBC, and EWS candidates have to pay Rs. 1,000/-. SC, ST, PwBD, and Women candidates are exempted from the application fee but must pay Rs. 500/- as postal expenses.

faq.question: Q4. Is hard copy submission mandatory for Assam University application?
faq.answer: Yes, submission of the hard copy of the online application along with self-attested documents is mandatory. Applications without hard copy will not be considered.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale for Professor at Assam University?
faq.answer: Professor posts are in Academic Level-14 with pay matrix of Rs. 1,44,200 – 2,18,200 plus allowances as per 7th CPC and UGC norms.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: As per UGC Regulations – Master’s degree with NET/SET or Ph.D. in the relevant subject. Specific specializations are mentioned for many departments.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply for posts in both Silchar HQ and Diphu Campus?
faq.answer: Yes, but separate applications must be submitted for each post/campus with the correct post code.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for teaching positions at Assam University?
faq.answer: There is no upper age limit for Professor and Associate Professor posts. For Assistant Professor, age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q9. How will the selection be done?
faq.answer: Selection is based on screening of applications followed by personal interview. The University may conduct a written test if the number of applications is large.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send the hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: The hard copy must be sent to Deputy Registrar, Room No. 103, Raja Rammohan Roy Administrative Building, Assam University, Silchar – 788011, Cachar, Assam.
